de.uka.ilkd.key.util

Interface FileCollection

  • All Known Implementing Classes:
    DirectoryFileCollection, JavaReduxFileCollection, ZipFileCollection

    public interface FileCollection
    This class encapsulates a collection of files which is arbitrarily organised. It is iterable and allows to open all files (not directories) during the iteration as streams. Subclasses allow to iterate a jar/zip-file or a directory. Typical usage: 
       FileCollection fc = ... ;
   FileCollection.Walker walker = fc.createWalker(".java");
   while(walker.step()) {
      // use the data of current location via walker.getCurrent...()
   }
    Author:
    MU

    • Nested Class Summary

      Nested Classes 
      Modifier and Type Interface and Description
      static interface  FileCollection.Walker
      A Walker allows to iterate (once and one way) through a FileCollection.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      FileCollection.Walker createWalker(String extension)
      create a FileCollection.Walker object that allows to iterate the file collection.
      FileCollection.Walker createWalker(String[] extensions)
      create a FileCollection.Walker object that allows to iterate the file collection.

    • Method Detail

      • createWalker

        FileCollection.Walker createWalker(String extension)
                                   throws IOException
        create a FileCollection.Walker object that allows to iterate the file collection. The search can be restricted to files with a certain extension. If this is not desired, one specifies null for the extension.
        Parameters:
        extension - file extension to be considered only. null if all files are to be considered.
        Returns:
        a freshly created walker
        Throws:
        IOException - during opening resources

      • createWalker

        FileCollection.Walker createWalker(String[] extensions)
                                   throws IOException
        create a FileCollection.Walker object that allows to iterate the file collection. The search can be restricted to files with a certain extension. If this is not desired, one specifies null for the extension.
        Parameters:
        extensions - file extensions to be considered only. null if all files are to be considered.
        Returns:
        a freshly created walker
        Throws:
        IOException - during opening resources
